message:
Add external package import system foundation (Flask milestone)

Import resolution:
- Add mise site-packages discovery for macOS
- Support relative imports (.app -> flask/app.py)
- Fix infinite loop in import scanner with proper visited tracking
- Add pyfile.zig to runtime file list

Parser improvements:
- Support dotted type annotations (t.Any, typing.Optional)
- Support PEP 604 union types (int | str)
- Handle Pipe, Dot, Colon, Ellipsis in type brackets

Codegen fixes:
- Dict iteration: for x in dict -> .keys()
- Allocator analyzer: skip str/print (use __global_allocator)
- Add file type to JSON stringify switch

Flask submodules now resolve:
.app, .blueprints, .config, .ctx, .globals, .helpers,
.json, .signals, .templating, .wrappers

Next: Fix module compilation FileNotFound during codegen
